title: pterostylis jonesii
intro: Pterostylis jonesii, commonly known as the Jones' greenhood orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pterostylis jonesii are said to include the relief of respiratory issues and skin conditions, as well as the promotion of wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pterostylis jonesii are typically made by infusing the plant material in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat various ailments.
